stemHtml: Prior to departure an aircraft is loaded with 16 500 litres of fuel at a fuel density of 780 kg/m3. This is entered into the load sheet as 16 500 kg and calculations are carried out accordingly. As a result of this error, the aircraft is…

options.a: lighter than anticipated and the calculated safety speeds will be too high.
options.b: heavier than anticipated and the calculated safety speeds will be too high.
options.c: heavier than anticipated and the calculated safety speeds will be too low.
options.d: lighter than anticipated and the calculated safety speeds will be too low.
